spec_match.rationale: The playlist tab now uses the native audio:playing sibling selector to highlight the active row, with no JavaScript style writes for playback state.

interactive.rationale: Great multi-tab interface showcasing three patterns (music player, video wrapper, playlist board) with working silent audio loops.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Excellent copy-pasteable production HTML/CSS layout blueprints.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers has(:playing) combinators and buffering spinner rules correctly.

references.rationale: The concept now links directly to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5068277495758848 in its references section.

design_system.rationale: The touched playback states and copyable CSS now use shared design-system variables instead of raw color literals.

summary: The production UX pattern now uses native media pseudo-class selectors for the playlist highlight and includes the required ChromeStatus reference, clearing the prior compliance failures.
